title: Mapstale City 11
description: Mapstale City 11: Reforged for the Winter!
body:
# MAPSTALE CITY SEASON 11 : THE REFORGE OF THE WINTER

This modpack is the successor to the previous modpacks of our Minecraft server -- with the twist of infrastructure being moved from Fabric to Neoforge. It's planned to be maintained during the entirety of winter, adding more QoL features.

![the-logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb143ef13d9e19bb7ec3eaf974e05387ceaf7c27.png)
